channel.title: JLT What's Trending — LinkedIn
channel.description: What's Trending in Travel — LinkedIn Business edition

item.title: UK travellers are not booking less in 2026. They are booking more carefully.
item.description:
UK travellers are not booking less in 2026. They are booking more carefully.
Four trends our agents are drawing on this week:
- 42% of travellers are booking earlier to lock in value; 40% are choosing off-peak timing (Criteo 2026) - Scandinavia and cooler-climate destinations are growing fast… Scandinavia bookings tipped to rise up to 35% this year - The "one big trip" pattern is gaining ground… 12 to 14 night escapes, twin-centres, and long-haul bucket-list itineraries are the shape clients are asking for - Travellers browse 25 hotel listings on average before deciding… a structured three-option quote is the most effective response
Helping clients be smart with their timing and their money is where great agent relationships are built. The full trend breakdown is on the JLT blog this week.
[Blog link to be added in comments after 24-48 hrs]
